name: TestWaitForLinTransmError
title: TestWaitForLinTransmError
description: Waits for the occurrence of LIN Transmission Error event. Should the event not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: aFrameId
parameters.description: Numeric ID of a frame whose Transmission Error should be awaited. Default value: wait for any ID

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
